fields.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Implementation Steps
1. Open plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md
2. Locate the opening role statement section (ends at line 17, before '## Input Requirements' at line 19)
3. Insert the following '## Output Scope' section between the role statement and '## Input Requirements':

---
## Output Scope

Dev-team artifacts (design documents, investigation findings, archive files) use project-local directories only:
- `docs/designs/` — design and UI artifacts (wireframes, spatial layouts, design manifests)
- `docs/findings/` — investigation results and research findings
- `docs/archive/` — superseded documents and archived artifacts

If the resolved output path is not under one of the four Documentation Schema tiers below OR one of these three artifact directories, stop and report the intended path to the orchestrator before writing.
---

4. Remove the RED marker from .test-index: update the plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md entry so
   tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh [test_output_scope_section_present_before_input_requirements]
   becomes tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh (no RED bracket)
5. Verify test from f4cf-1d33 now passes GREEN

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md contains '## Output Scope' as a section header
  Verify: grep -q '## Output Scope' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md
- [ ] Output Scope section appears before Input Requirements section (lower line number)
  Verify: test $(grep -n '## Output Scope' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md | cut -d: -f1 | head -1) -lt $(grep -n '## Input Requirements' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md | cut -d: -f1 | head -1)
- [ ] Output Scope section contains docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/
  Verify: grep -q 'docs/designs/' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md && grep -q 'docs/findings/' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md && grep -q 'docs/archive/' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md
- [ ] Output Scope section contains halt condition language
  Verify: grep -q 'stop and report' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md
- [ ] No 'plugins/dso' appears in doc-writer.md (no plugin path prohibition)
  Verify: test $(grep -c 'plugins/dso' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md) -eq 0
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index (test now passes GREEN)
  Verify: grep 'plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md' .test-index | grep -v '\[test_output_scope'
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh passes (all assertions GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-doc-writer-output-scope.sh
fields.title: Add Output Scope section to doc-writer.md with positive enumeration and halt condition
